data.name: OTs-14

weaponImprint.name: Capitoline
weaponImprint.trait: If a weakness is exploited, ignores 20% of target's defense.
weaponImprint.effect: Increases damage dealt by active attacks by 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. If the active skill does not deal damage, increases attack power by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20% for the current round.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with debuffs is increased by 2.5%, and damage dealt to Orlog Conglomerate is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
A calm, serious, proud, and confident third-generation T-Doll. The modifications granted her unparalleled power, making her even more resilient than before—enough to conceal her underlying unease and vulnerability.
"How did today's plan go? Commander, may I hear a little about it?"

skills.name: Combat Instinct
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Omni damage equal to 90% of attack to it.

Dandegate note: Omni damage includes Burn, Freeze, Corrosion, Hydro, and Electric and is affect by those phases. Physical is not included as Omni and effects that buffs Physical damage does NOT work with Omni damage.

skills.name: Critical Splash
skills.description:
Select 1 tile within a 3 to 10 tile radius in front, dealing AoE Omni damage equal to 150% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles.

Consumes 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] and deals additional fixed damage equal to 10% of the accumulated damage of that [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab].

Dandegate Note: This basic attack is only available when OTs-14 is in Reverse Assimilation state.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select 1 tile within a 3 to 10 tile radius in front, dealing AoE Omni damage equal to 200% of attack to all enemy targets within 5 tiles.

Consumes 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] and deals additional fixed damage equal to 10% of the accumulated damage of that [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab].

Dandegate Note: This basic attack is only available when OTs-14 is in Reverse Assimilation state.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] is enhanced: The damage multiplier of [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] is increased to 200% and its effective range is increased by 2 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] is enhanced: For each use of the basic attack [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] in the current round, the damage multiplier of [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] is increased by 50% and the fixed damage multiplier by consuming [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] is increased by 10%.

skills.name: Boojum Phenomenon
skills.description:
At the start of battle, OTs-14 uses [effect:fb6673c7-f351-43ce-8409-16113298f466] and enters [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].

At the end of the round, if the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:5c26e252-8379-4817-8d47-9a5d5b15bec2] was not used in the current turn, the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is converted into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab].

At the end of OTs-14's action, if she is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] state, she switches to the [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of battle, OTs-14 uses [effect:fb6673c7-f351-43ce-8409-16113298f466] and enters [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].

At the end of the round, if the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:5c26e252-8379-4817-8d47-9a5d5b15bec2] was not used in the current turn, the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is converted into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab].

At the end of OTs-14's action, if she is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] state, she switches to the [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:fb6673c7-f351-43ce-8409-16113298f466] is enhanced which also enhances the following effects:

  • [effect:6548fcaa-7852-4083-92c8-1cfde81baae8]

  • [effect:355a0600-b456-4cde-8206-a2bc050b4fda]

  • [effect:5b9457f8-3280-46da-b81f-e531990d881a]

  • [effect:4ea1e0c8-2501-4711-a28e-7d9f45263d86]

  • [effect:5848c35f-2bb6-4a6b-bcaa-330cb1cfbd92]

  • [effect:b013dadc-e2ff-4f96-8fee-fcd2898cf38b]

skills.name: Total Suppression
skills.description:
Select 1 tile within 8 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Omni damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x3 area.

If the user is in [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa], the damage accumulated through [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is increased by 25%.

If the user is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], the damage dealt is increased by 15% for every 15% of initial critical damage and the damage multiplier is doubled.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select 1 tile within 8 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Omni damage equal to 150% of attack to all enemy targets within a 5x5 area.

If the user is in [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa], the damage accumulated through [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is increased by 25%.

If the user is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], the damage dealt is increased by 15% for every 15% of initial critical damage and the damage multiplier is doubled.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Select 1 tile within 8 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Omni damage equal to 150% of attack to all enemy targets within a 5x5 area.

If the user is in [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa], the damage accumulated through [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is increased by 33%.

If the user is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], both damage dealt and damage multiplier are increased by 15% for every 15% of initial critical damage and the damage multiplier is doubled.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier increased to 150%.

Effective area increased to 5x5 area.

Cooldown is reduced by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
While in [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa] state, the accumulated damage is increased by 33%.

While in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] state, the damage multiplier is increased by 15% for every 15% of initial critical damage.

skills.name: Perfect Adaptation
skills.description: Switches [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b]. After using this skill, OTs-14 gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. This skill can be used a maximum of 3 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa] is enhanced: Critical damage of all friendly allies (excluding self) is increased by 15% of initial critical damage.

[effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] is enhanced: Attack is increased by 15% of the initial attack of all friendly Dolls.

skills.name: Blast Verdict
skills.description:
Select 1 direction and apply [effect:efb06ac2-e0a3-439e-8158-e0bb0863c67e] to all enemy targets within a 3 to 10 tile radius in the selected direction for 2 turns.

Converts the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] and gains [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] for 1 turn.

This skill can be used while in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], with [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] stacks, or when damage accumulated in [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is greater than 0.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Select 1 direction and apply [effect:efb06ac2-e0a3-439e-8158-e0bb0863c67e] to all enemy targets within a 3 to 10 tile radius in the selected direction for 2 turns.

Converts the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] and gains [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] for 1 turn.

This skill can be used while in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], with [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] stacks, or when damage accumulated in [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is greater than 0.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Select 1 direction and apply [effect:efb06ac2-e0a3-439e-8158-e0bb0863c67e] to all enemy targets within a 3 to 10 tile radius in the selected direction for 2 turns.

Converts the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] and gains [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] for 1 turn.

This skill can be used while in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], with [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] stacks, or when damage accumulated in [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is greater than 0.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] is enhanced: The damage multiplier of [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] is increased to 200% and its effective range is increased by 2 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] is enhanced: For each use of the basic attack [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] in the current round, the damage multiplier of [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] is increased by 50% and the fixed damage multiplier by consuming [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab] is increased by 10%.

keys.effect: Fixed damage dealt by the user is increased by 10%.
After using the active skills Total Suppression or Perfect Adaptation, OTs-14 gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] which can be triggered once per turn.
OTS-14 cleanses all debuffs from self after going into [effect:924874ba-ccc3-4209-a222-6fe41635748a] state.
When an active attack hits only 1 enemy target, damage dealt to the enemy target is increased by 20%.
The active skill Total Suppression cleanse 1 buff from the enemy targets before it resolves.
While OTs-14 is in [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa], reduce damage taken by 20%.

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa] is enhanced: Critical damage of all friendly allies (excluding self) is increased by 15% of initial critical damage.

[effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] is enhanced: Attack is increased by 15% of the initial attack of all friendly Dolls.

If the user is in [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa], the damage accumulated through [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is increased by 33%.

If the user is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a], both damage dealt and damage multiplier are increased by 15% for every 15% of initial critical damage and the damage multiplier is doubled.

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:fb6673c7-f351-43ce-8409-16113298f466] is enhanced which also enhances the following effects:

  • [effect:6548fcaa-7852-4083-92c8-1cfde81baae8]

  • [effect:355a0600-b456-4cde-8206-a2bc050b4fda]

  • [effect:5b9457f8-3280-46da-b81f-e531990d881a]

  • [effect:4ea1e0c8-2501-4711-a28e-7d9f45263d86]

  • [effect:5848c35f-2bb6-4a6b-bcaa-330cb1cfbd92]

  • [effect:b013dadc-e2ff-4f96-8fee-fcd2898cf38b]

doll.name: OTs-14
doll.effects:
A calm, serious, proud, and confident third-generation T-Doll. The modifications granted her unparalleled power, making her even more resilient than before—enough to conceal her underlying unease and vulnerability.
"How did today's plan go? Commander, may I hear a little about it?"

skillsLevel2.name: Boojum Phenomenon
skillsLevel2.description:
At the start of battle, OTs-14 uses [effect:fb6673c7-f351-43ce-8409-16113298f466] and enters [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].

At the end of the round, if the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:5c26e252-8379-4817-8d47-9a5d5b15bec2] was not used in the current turn, the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is converted into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab].

At the end of OTs-14's action, if she is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] state, she switches to the [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of battle, OTs-14 uses [effect:fb6673c7-f351-43ce-8409-16113298f466] and enters [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].

At the end of the round, if the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:5c26e252-8379-4817-8d47-9a5d5b15bec2] was not used in the current turn, the damage accumulated by [effect:0ddc7cf2-1755-412c-828c-b13c26a4c63b] is converted into 1 point of [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab].

At the end of OTs-14's action, if she is in [effect:e51eebc8-9891-4469-8bce-fd9cd2d0694a] state, she switches to the [effect:e81d2d6c-effb-4343-847c-221c9caf0daa].

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by active attacks is increased by 8%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Omni damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
If the majority of the attribute among friendly Dolls is Burn, gain [effect:6548fcaa-7852-4083-92c8-1cfde81baae8].

If the majority of the attribute among friendly Dolls is Electric, gain [effect:355a0600-b456-4cde-8206-a2bc050b4fda].

If the majority of the attribute among friendly Dolls is Freeze, gain [effect:5b9457f8-3280-46da-b81f-e531990d881a].

If the majority of the attribute among friendly Dolls is Corrosion, gain [effect:4ea1e0c8-2501-4711-a28e-7d9f45263d86].

If the majority of the attribute among friendly Dolls is Hydro, gain [effect:5848c35f-2bb6-4a6b-bcaa-330cb1cfbd92].

If the majority of the attribute among friendly Dolls is Physical or if there is a tie for majority attribute, gain [effect:b013dadc-e2ff-4f96-8fee-fcd2898cf38b].

{"mainDetails":"

Increase critical damage of all friendly units (excluding self) by 10% of this unit's initial critical damage.

Accumulates all damage dealt by friendly units (excluding self). Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"6d40d7e6-8573-468f-b253-7202d2fb60ab","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

Increase critical damage of all friendly units (excluding self) by 15% of this unit's initial critical damage.

Accumulates all damage dealt by friendly units (excluding self). Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Increase attack by 10% of the total initial attack of all friendly Dolls (excluding self).

Accumulates damage dealt by self, excluding damage from basic attack Critical Splash.

Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"a91abc37-4a96-4bb6-9492-3efed724f7f0","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

Increase attack by 15% of the total initial attack of all friendly Dolls (excluding self).

Accumulates damage dealt by self, excluding damage from basic attack Critical Splash.

Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. After using active skill Total Suppression, gain 13 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

","upgrades":[{"id":"bb6a4d0b-d15e-4640-a6b8-f8289697f5fd","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

The active skill Total Suppression gains a new effect: Additionally generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. After using active skill Total Suppression, gain 13 stacks of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

Whenever an ally gains [effect:27d1b457-e6a0-4327-9ee5-777be0028c79], cleanse 1 debuff from them.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

When an enemy unit takes damage, damage taken is increased by 2% for each debuff held by the enemy unit.

","upgrades":[{"id":"6a672c48-7011-4764-a0ad-262f8f061aa3","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

The active skill Total Suppression gains a new effect: Additionally generates [effect:1c5e2242-b8ce-41b6-934a-5779d82f6790] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

When an enemy unit takes damage, damage taken is increased by 2% for each debuff held by the enemy unit.

The active skill Total Suppression additionally triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within the skill's effective range.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Damage dealt by friendly units to enemy targets under Stability Break is increased by 15%.

","upgrades":[{"id":"b2ff7feb-8d6a-4978-a744-7d6be0068958","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

The active skill Total Suppression gains a new effect: Additionally generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

Damage dealt by friendly units to enemy targets under Stability Break is increased by 15%.

When an enemy goes into Stability Break, all friendly units recovers 1 point of Stability index.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

If a friendly unit possesess a Shield, their damage dealt is increased by 15%.

","upgrades":[{"id":"e858e36d-80bd-4edf-a23c-3fa6ae0fb122","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

The active skill Total Suppression gains a new effect: Additionally generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

When friendly units deals damage, their attack is increased by 10% of their Shield value.

If a friendly unit possesses a Shield, their damage dealt is increased by 15%.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

For each friendly units on the field, damage dealt by all friendly units is increased by 2%.

","upgrades":[{"id":"aff61c7b-2fed-412a-ba80-65525fea2678","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

The active skill Total Suppression gains a new effect: Additionally generates [effect:a7a2cc2b-3078-4d27-bafc-f20b389335c0] tiles, lasting for 2 turns.

For each friendly units on the field, damage dealt by all friendly units is increased by 2% and both attack and Max HP of all friendly [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] are increased by 1%.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

While under [Demolition Mode], attack is increased by 30%.

","upgrades":[{"id":"1696f1a7-411a-4ff2-9ccf-54cc31162c1c","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

While under [Demolition Mode], attack is increased by 50%.

For every 15% of initial critical damage, attacks ignore 5% of the target's defense.

","order":0}]}

Cannot move, cannot rotate, cannot benefit from cover damage reduction, and is immune to crowd control effects.

While possessing an [effect:20d8fa46-65f8-4a7b-853a-437b8bf69aab], the basic attack [dollSkill:100114b6-0038-411f-a878-0925264cd669] can be used.
